title: 2025-11-18 TACO Pressure Index Update: Elevated at 32.05
description: Daily pressure check for 2025-11-18: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 32.05/100, signaling a elevated pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
hero_summary: This custom framework combines equities, front-end rates, inflation expectations, and volatility into one daily score. On 2025-11-18, the score printed 32.05/100 in the elevated regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
